figures.caption: Figure 1: Left: L2(Ω)- and H1(Ω)-semi-norm errors for u, L2(ΓI)-error for d̃, and error in Cu; right: energy error with reference value E(u, d̃) ≈ −15.5424.

Figure 2: Left: temperature uh ∈ S1(Th) computed on a structured mesh with 65,536 simplices. Center: distribution function d̃h ∈ S1(SI h) in the normal direction. Right: distribution function d̃h in the transversal direction. The support of d̃h intersects all four sides, while the contact set has positive measure and leaves the central parts of the top and bottom edges uninsulated.

Figure 3: Qualitative three-dimensional reentry capsule test for the normalized insulation budgets m/|ΓI | ∈ {0.1, 0.5, 1, 1.5, 2, 2.5}. Top: discrete temperature uh ∈ S1(Th). Bottom: discrete optimal insulation distribution (in the transversal direction) dh := (k ·n)−1d̃h ∈ H1(ΓI).
